cards.title: SGLangs Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P1] SGLangs `replay_request_dump.py` contains an insecure pickle.load() without validation, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects SGLangs users and is considered high-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: Keycloak Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P1] A flaw was found in Keycloak, allowing an authorization bypass vulnerability, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects Keycloak users and is considered high-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: OpenClaw Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] A vulnerability was determined in OpenClaw, affecting its 2026.2.19-2 version, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects OpenClaw users and is considered medium-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.60)

cards.title: SGLang Multimodal Generation Module Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P1] SGLang's multimodal generation module is vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects SGLang users and is considered high-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: mod_proxy_cluster Carriage Return Line Feed Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] A flaw was found in mod_proxy_cluster, allowing a Carriage Return Line Feed vulnerability, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects mod_proxy_cluster users and is considered medium-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.60)

cards.title: OpenClaw Up to 2026.2.17 Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] A vulnerability was identified in OpenClaw up to 2026.2.17, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects OpenClaw users and is considered medium-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.60)

cards.title: Streamsoft Prestiż Software Token Encoding Algorithm Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] Use of a custom token encoding algorithm in Streamsoft Prestiż software allows unauthorized access, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects Streamsoft Prestiż software users and is considered medium-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.60)

cards.title: SGLang Encoder Parallel Disaggregation System Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P1] SGLang's encoder parallel disaggregation system is vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects SGLang users and is considered high-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: Progress Flowmon ADS Versions Prior to 12.5.5 and 13.0.3 Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] A vulnerability exists in Progress Flowmon ADS versions prior to 12.5.5 and 13.0.3, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects Progress Flowmon ADS users and is considered medium-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.60)

cards.title: Progress Flowmon ADS Versions Prior to 12.5.5 and 13.0 Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] A vulnerability exists in Progress Flowmon ADS versions prior to 12.5.5 and 13.0, and no patch is available. This vulnerability affects Progress Flowmon ADS users and is considered medium-risk. Why now: No patch is available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.60)
